title: SNAP OUTREACH PROGRAM - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY DCHS YOUTH AND FAMILY SERVICES DIVISION SNAP OUTREACH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Conducts community outreach and enrollment assistance to help people apply for SNAP (food stamps) and other state and local programs. 209 SW 4th Avenue Suite 200 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Income eligibility for SNAP follows a guideline of 200% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) or below. Eligibility for SNAP and other benefits is determined on a case-by-case basis. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Weekend and evening availability by appointment. Email (503) 823-4000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (503) 823-4000 Intake (503) 320-6658 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or email for information or appointment. Can assist people over the phone or in person. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Benefits and Services Assistance * Public Assistance Issues Certificates/Forms Assistance * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - LOW INCOME HOME ENERGY ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN COMMUNITY SCHOOLS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY DCHS YOUTH AND FAMILY SERVICES DIVISION
